full_text:
Qiao Zhou (Yunnan) 譙周 (允南)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qiao Zhou (譙周), styledYunnan (允南), was born in Ba. Historian and teacher, advised Liu Shan to surrender. Opposed Jiang Wei and Huang Hao. Qiao Zhou was affiliated with Liu Zhang, the Shu Kingdom, and the Jin Dynasty. Qiao Zhou lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
